name: SAN JUAN BASIN ROYALTY TRUST
business: The Trust holds a 75% net overriding royalty interest in the Subject Interests, which consist of working interests, royalty interests, overriding royalty interests and other contractual rights in 151,900 gross (119,000 net) producing acres in northwestern New Mexico. The Trust's income is derived from Royalty Income, which is 75% of Net Proceeds from the Subject Interests, primarily from natural gas and oil production. The Trust does not operate any assets; its sole function is to collect Royalty Income, pay expenses, and distribute remaining income to Unit Holders.

exposures.sentence: The principal asset of the Trust is the Royalty, which consists of a 75% net overriding royalty interest that burdens the Subject Interests located in the San Juan Basin.

catalysts.sentence: On February 19, 2026, the Trust announced that Hilcorp had provided the Trust with its 2026 capital project plan for the Subject Interests (the "2026 Plan"), and Hilcorp has estimated its 2026 capital expenditures for the Subject Interests to be approximately $14.0 million.

catalysts.event: Completion costs for horizontal wells expected in 2027 capital plan
catalysts.sentence: Completion costs for the horizontal wells are expected to be included in Hilcorp’s 2027 capital plan for the Subject Interests, which is expected to be provided to the Trust sometime in the first quarter of 2027.
